topic: Can chemistry predict which perfume will become a bestseller?

payload.topic: Can chemistry predict which perfume will become a bestseller?
payload.story_focus: scientific prediction of fragrance market success
payload.strategic_angle: Can chemistry predict which perfume will become a bestseller
payload.fused_conflict: What cross-domain forces decide scientific prediction of fragrance market success?
fused_clip_structure: Question — can chemistry and data predict which perfume becomes a bestseller?
Mechanism — compare formulation science, market share, consumer testing, and brand launch evidence.
Takeaway — what prediction models get right and what branding still decides for bestseller success.
payload.fused_setting: a luxury fragrance innovation studio with brand strategy boards, scent evaluation strips, raw material bottles, and AI preference dashboards
